Work

Featured
Projects

01 — Final Year Project

Low-Light Image Enhancement & Human Detection

Developed a robust system that enhances low-light images and detects humans using MATLAB-based image processing pipelines and machine learning algorithms. Built to operate in challenging visibility conditions.

MATLAB Image Processing Machine Learning
02 — IoT Project

IoT-based Smart Parking System

Engineered a real-time smart parking monitoring system integrating IoT sensors with the Blynk mobile app. Enables live slot tracking and remote visibility for efficient urban parking management.

IoT Embedded Systems Blynk App
03 — ML Project

Heart Disease Detection using ML

Built a predictive model using classification algorithms to detect heart disease from patient health metrics. Focused on accuracy, interpretability, and real-world clinical applicability.

Python Machine Learning Healthcare
